title: Sesame Halloumi
summary: We love halloumi. It's salty, delicious, and the perfect main for your work-from-home lunch.

method.description: Squeeze the lemon juice into a bowl, then stir in the honey, sesame seeds, chilli flakes if using, a good pinch of salt and black pepper and 3 tbsp water to make the halloumi dressing.
Drain and cut the halloumi into thick slices. Get your largest frying pan over a medium-high heat. Add the halloumi and fry for around 2 mins on each side until crisp and golden.
Turn down the heat to the lowest setting, pour in the sesame honey dressing and cook for 1 min more, using a spoon to baste the halloumi in the dressing.
Throw the halloumi onto a base of your choice and enjoy!

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
